overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The scene features wet streets reflecting colorful neon signs, elevated train tracks, and futuristic architecture with a mix of commercial billboards and industrial elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated transit tracks

events.description: futuristic vehicle drives past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: following the character in the red jacket along the sidewalk under elevated tracks, passing closed storefronts

notable_agents.action: character in red jacket walking steadily ahead of the camera

entered.detail: red neon sign reading CALIENTE mounted on a building facade
building front with closed corrugated metal shutters and yellow trim
massive elevated concrete transit structure running parallel to the street above
tall street light with bright white illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark cyberpunk street at night, following a character in a red jacket along a wet concrete sidewalk beneath elevated train tracks. A red neon sign reading 'CALIENTE' glows on the left while metal-shuttered buildings line the right. A futuristic vehicle passes by on the street as the camera maintains a steady following distance behind the lead character.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large digital advertisements and planters

events.description: large curved digital billboard with animated face advertisement becomes visible on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past other pedestrians, approaching a large digital billboard display

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying an animated advertisement with a person's face
illuminated signage reading 'REAL WATER' in white letters
rectangular planters containing palm trees and spiky vegetation

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more open commercial area where a massive digital billboard dominates the right side of the frame, displaying a glowing advertisement. The camera passes concrete planters with palm trees and approaches a 'REAL WATER' sign. The elevated tracks recede into the background as the street opens up with more pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with graffiti-covered industrial buildings

events.description: character crosses the street from the right sidewalk to the left side
futuristic sports car drives past on the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at an intersection and continuing along the opposite sidewalk past industrial buildings

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car with glowing elements driving down the street

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
tall industrial-style building with dark facade and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at an intersection, moving from the commercial billboard area to a more industrial zone. The camera follows across the asphalt crosswalk, revealing graffiti-covered walls and industrial architecture on the opposite side. A futuristic sports car passes by on the street as the character continues walking along the new sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that shifts from a claustrophobic underpass into an open commercial plaza and finally toward an industrial zone. It begins by trailing a character in a red jacket along a wet concrete sidewalk beneath elevated train tracks, passing a glowing red Caliente sign and metal-shuttered buildings. As the camera moves forward, the environment opens into a commercial area where the tracks recede and a massive digital billboard dominates the view alongside palm trees and a Real Water sign. The scene then shifts as the character crosses an asphalt intersection, moving away from the bright advertisements toward a grittier landscape. Finally, the camera follows the character onto a new sidewalk lined with graffiti-covered walls and industrial architecture as a futuristic sports car speeds past.
